text: Last class I handled the objection: the price is high, however our quality is much better.
Tonight we celebrate at dinner. Have you ever tried this cuisine?

Excuse me for a moment; I will be right back.

Hi Simone, this is Laura from the events team, with a quick note before tonight's corporate dinner. The host will welcome everyone at seven, and then the guests will mingle before we sit down. Here is some advice. When you meet someone, do not talk about the contract right away. Start with light social topics. Ask about experience: have you been to this restaurant before, or have you ever tried this cuisine? People love a small compliment, so tell the host the food looks wonderful. When the host gives a toast, lift your glass and say cheers with everyone. If you need to leave the table, just say excuse me politely. And remember, you do not have to talk all evening. If you want a short break, you can step outside for a moment. Relax, enjoy the conversation, and have a lovely evening.

First, Simone arrives at the corporate dinner and the host welcomes her at the door. Next, she mingles with the other guests and starts with light social topics, not business. Then she asks about experience: have you been here before, or have you ever tried this cuisine. After that, the host gives a toast, everyone lifts a glass, and they all say cheers. Finally, when she needs to leave the table, she says excuse me politely and thanks the host for a lovely evening.
